steps.expected: Cockpit page loads with Kanban board visible
steps.observed: Cockpit page loaded, Kanban board visible with 7 columns and 2 issue cards

steps.action: Scroll to Kanban board and take before-drag screenshot
steps.expected: ACM-2 in IN PROGRESS column (count=1), TODO column empty (count=0)
steps.observed: ACM-2 card visible in IN PROGRESS column (count=1), TODO column shows count=0, ACM-1 in BLOCKED column (count=1)

steps.action: Mouse down on ACM-2 card center (644, 635), move incrementally to TODO column center (392, 644), exceeding 5px PointerSensor threshold
steps.expected: Drag overlay appears showing the card being dragged
steps.observed: Drag overlay of ACM-2 card appeared in the TODO column area, ghost of original card remained dimmed in IN PROGRESS column

steps.action: Mouse up to release card in TODO column
steps.expected: ACM-2 card moves to TODO column, UI updates immediately
steps.observed: ACM-2 card now in TODO column (count=1), IN PROGRESS column empty (count=0) — optimistic UI update confirmed

steps.action: Reload page to verify Supabase persistence
steps.expected: ACM-2 remains in TODO column after refresh
steps.observed: After full page reload, ACM-2 is still in TODO column (count=1), IN PROGRESS column still empty (count=0) — persistence to Supabase confirmed

evidence.network: Supabase mutation persisted status change (optimistic update + server write confirmed via page refresh)

summary: Tested 1 assertion: 1 passed. VAL-KANBAN-003 drag-drop successfully moved ACM-2 from IN PROGRESS to TODO column. The @dnd-kit PointerSensor activated correctly with incremental mouse movement (>5px). Optimistic UI update was immediate and the status change persisted to Supabase (confirmed via page refresh).
